235 G0110I2_TOILTG_SPRT_CD G0110I2_TOILTG_SPRT_CD G0110I2 ADL Assistance: Toileting Support Provided Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the amount of support that the resident requires to use the toilet. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=No setup or physical help from staff
 1=Setup help only
 2=One person physical assist
 3=Two+ persons physical assist
 8=ADL activity did not occur or family and/or non-facility staff provided care
